final:
module binary_up_counter_4bit(
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (!rst_n) begin
        count <= 4'b0000;
    end else begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
